# PrimitiveKit

> A flexible, accessible React component library with 600+ design tokens. Zero hardcoded values. Complete customization.


## Blog
- [Design Token Deep Dive](https://primitivekit.com/blog/design-tokens/): Design Token Deep DiveLearn how PrimitiveKit&rsquo;s comprehensive design token system enables … - Published 2024-01-20
- [Getting Started with PrimitiveKit](https://primitivekit.com/blog/getting-started/): Getting Started with PrimitiveKitWelcome to PrimitiveKit! This guide will help you get up and … - Published 2024-01-15

## Documentation
- [Customization](https://primitivekit.com/docs/customization/): PrimitiveKit components are built with zero hardcoded values. Every visual property is customizable …
- [Installation](https://primitivekit.com/docs/installation/): InstallationInstall PrimitiveKit for your framework of choice. All packages are available on NPM. …
- [Accessibility](https://primitivekit.com/docs/accessibility/): PrimitiveKit components are built with accessibility as a core principle, following WCAG 2.1 AA …
- [Quick Start](https://primitivekit.com/docs/quick-start/): Quick StartGet up and running with PrimitiveKit in 5 minutes.
1. Install Choose your framework and …
- [Design Tokens](https://primitivekit.com/docs/design-tokens/): PrimitiveKit includes 600+ design tokens following the DTCG specification and industry best …
- [Framework Comparison](https://primitivekit.com/docs/framework-comparison/): Framework ComparisonChoose the right PrimitiveKit package for your project. All frameworks share the …
- [Theming](https://primitivekit.com/docs/theming/): ThemingCreate custom themes for your application using PrimitiveKit&rsquo;s design token system. …
- [Test Page](https://primitivekit.com/docs/test-page/): Test PageThis is a test page to verify the framework switcher is working.
Instructions Look at the …

### React Components
- [Alert](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/alert/): AlertAn alert component for displaying important messages to users.
Import import { Alert } from …
- [Avatar](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/avatar/): AvatarA component for displaying user avatars with fallback options.
Import import { Avatar } from …
- [Button](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/button/): ButtonA versatile, accessible button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states.
Import …
- [Card](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/card/): CardA flexible container component for grouping related content.
Import import { Card } from …
- [Link](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/link/): LinkA styled link component with variants and accessibility features.
Import import { Link } from …
- [Modal](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/modal/): ModalA modal dialog component for displaying content in an overlay.
Import import { Modal } from …
- [Badge](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/badge/): BadgeA small status indicator component for labels and counts.
Import import { Badge } from …
- [Breadcrumb](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/breadcrumb/): BreadcrumbA breadcrumb navigation component for showing the current page location.
Import import { …
- [Container](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/container/): ContainerA responsive container component for centering and constraining content width.
Import …
- [Drawer](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/drawer/): DrawerA slide-out panel component for displaying content from the side of the screen.
Import import …
- [Input](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/input/): InputA flexible text input component with validation states, icons, and extensive customization …
- [Tag](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/tag/): TagA tag component for labels, categories, and removable items.
Import import { Tag } from …
- [Grid](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/grid/): GridA flexible grid layout component based on CSS Grid.
Import import { Grid } from …
- [Select](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/select/): SelectA dropdown selection component with validation states and customization options.
Import import …
- [Spinner](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/spinner/): SpinnerA loading spinner component for indicating loading states.
Import import { Spinner } from …
- [Table](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/table/): TableA data table component with sorting, pagination, and customization.
Import import { Table } …
- [Tabs](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/tabs/): TabsA tabs component for organizing content into separate views.
Import import { Tabs } from …
- [Tooltip](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/tooltip/): TooltipA tooltip component for displaying helpful information on hover.
Import import { Tooltip } …
- [Checkbox](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/checkbox/): CheckboxA checkbox input component for boolean selections with customization options.
Import import …
- [Collapse](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/collapse/): CollapseA collapsible content component for showing and hiding content.
Import import { Collapse } …
- [Menu](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/menu/): MenuA navigation menu component with nested items and icons.
Import import { Menu } from …
- [Popover](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/popover/): PopoverA popover component for displaying rich content in an overlay.
Import import { Popover } from …
- [Progress](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/progress/): ProgressA progress bar component for showing completion status.
Import import { Progress } from …
- [Stack](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/stack/): StackA layout component for arranging children vertically or horizontally with consistent spacing. …
- [Dropdown](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/dropdown/): DropdownA dropdown menu component for displaying a list of actions or options.
Import import { …
- [Image](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/image/): ImageAn image component with loading states, fallback, and lazy loading support.
Import import { …
- [Radio](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/radio/): RadioA radio button component for single selection from multiple options.
Import import { Radio, …
- [Skeleton](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/skeleton/): SkeletonA placeholder component for loading content.
Import import { Skeleton } from …
- [Space](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/space/): SpaceA component for adding consistent spacing between elements.
Import import { Space } from …
- [Steps](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/steps/): StepsA step indicator component for multi-step processes.
Import import { Steps } from …
- [Divider](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/divider/): DividerA visual separator component for dividing content.
Import import { Divider } from …
- [Empty](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/empty/): EmptyAn empty state component for displaying when there&rsquo;s no data.
Import import { Empty } …
- [Pagination](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/pagination/): PaginationA pagination component for navigating through pages of content.
Import import { Pagination …
- [Switch](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/switch/): SwitchA toggle switch component for boolean on/off states.
Import import { Switch } from …
- [Textarea](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/textarea/): TextareaA multi-line text input component with auto-resize and validation states.
Import import { …
- [Typography](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/typography/): TypographyTypography components for consistent text styling.
Import import { Typography } from …
- [Slider](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/slider/): SliderA range slider component for selecting numeric values.
Import import { Slider } from …

Import import { Form } from …
- [Upload](https://primitivekit.com/docs/react/upload/): UploadA file upload component with drag-and-drop support and file previews.

### Vue Components
- [Card](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/card/): CardContainer component for grouping related content with optional header, body, and footer …
- [Container](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/container/): ContainerLayout component for constraining content width and centering content on the page.
Import …
- [Divider](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/divider/): DividerVisual separator component for dividing content sections horizontally or vertically.
Import …
- [Grid](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/grid/): GridLayout component for creating responsive grid layouts with customizable columns and gaps.
Import …
- [Space](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/space/): SpaceLayout component for adding consistent spacing between elements.
Import import { Space } from …
- [Stack](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/stack/): StackLayout component for arranging children in a vertical or horizontal stack with consistent …

- [Checkbox](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/checkbox/): CheckboxForm input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set.
Import import { …
- [Form](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/form/): FormContainer component for grouping form inputs with validation and submission handling.
Import …
- [Input](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/input/): InputText input field component with validation, icons, and various input types.
Import import { …
- [Radio](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/radio/): RadioForm input component for selecting a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices. …
- [Select](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/select/): SelectDropdown component for selecting one or multiple options from a list.
Import import { Select } …
- [Slider](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/slider/): SliderInput component for selecting a numeric value from a range using a draggable handle.
Import …
- [Switch](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/switch/): SwitchToggle component for switching between two states, typically on/off or enabled/disabled. …
- [Textarea](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/textarea/): TextareaMulti-line text input component for entering longer text content.
Import import { Textarea } …
- [Upload](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/upload/): UploadComponent for uploading files with drag-and-drop support and progress indication.
Import …
- [Alert](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/alert/): AlertFeedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
Import import …
- [Badge](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/badge/): BadgeSmall label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
Import import { Badge } …
- [Progress](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/progress/): ProgressFeedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
Import import …
- [Skeleton](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/skeleton/): SkeletonPlaceholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.
Import …
- [Spinner](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/spinner/): SpinnerLoading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
Import …
- [Breadcrumb](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/breadcrumb/): BreadcrumbNavigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure. …
- [Link](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/link/): LinkNavigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
Import import { …
- [Menu](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/menu/): MenuNavigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
Import import { Menu …
- [Pagination](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/pagination/): PaginationNavigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls. …
- [Steps](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/steps/): StepsNavigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
Import import …
- [Tabs](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/tabs/): TabsNavigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
Import …
- [Drawer](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/drawer/): DrawerOverlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen.
Import import { …
- [Dropdown](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/dropdown/): DropdownOverlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.
Import …
- [Modal](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/modal/): ModalOverlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction.
Import …
- [Popover](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/popover/): PopoverOverlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user …
- [Tooltip](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/tooltip/): TooltipOverlay component for displaying helpful information when hovering over an element.
Import …
- [Avatar](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/avatar/): AvatarComponent for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container. …
- [Collapse](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/collapse/): CollapseComponent for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation.
Import …
- [Empty](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/empty/): EmptyComponent for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.
Import import { …
- [Image](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/image/): ImageEnhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support.
Import import { …
- [Table](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/table/): TableData display component for showing structured data in rows and columns with sorting and …
- [Tag](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/tag/): TagRemovable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections.
Import import { Tag } from …
- [Typography](https://primitivekit.com/docs/vue/typography/): TypographyText component for consistent typography with predefined styles and semantic HTML.

- [Card](https://primitivekit.com/docs/svelte/card/): CardContainer component for grouping related content with optional header, body, and footer …

Import …

Import …
- [Space](https://primitivekit.com/docs/svelte/space/): SpaceLayout component for adding consistent spacing between elements.

- [Menu](https://primitivekit.com/docs/svelte/menu/): MenuNavigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.

### Astro Components
- [Card](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/card/): CardContainer component for grouping related content with optional header, body, and footer …
- [Container](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/container/): ContainerLayout component for constraining content width and centering content on the page.
Import …
- [Divider](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/divider/): DividerVisual separator component for dividing content sections horizontally or vertically.
Import …
- [Grid](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/grid/): GridLayout component for creating responsive grid layouts with customizable columns and gaps.
Import …
- [Space](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/space/): SpaceLayout component for adding consistent spacing between elements.
Import import { Space } from …
- [Stack](https://primitivekit.com/docs/astro/stack/): StackLayout component for arranging children in a vertical or horizontal stack with consistent …

Import …
